boundary: Audited rest <= 6 band only; not a full arbitrary-vector theorem.
consequence: Act(H2) positivity certificate applies directly to the audited Talagrand shell functional.
Vandermonde horn cycles vanish under symmetric shell readout.
The audited four-level obstruction is closed after Act readout.
name: Act Dependence Lemma
proof_idea: A face scene contributes to the shell functional only via counts N_{jk}.
The counts N_{jk} are exactly the public three-level shell profile.
Act is defined as the map from a face scene to that public shell profile.
Therefore any two face scenes with the same Act image have identical shell functional value.
statement: The Talagrand shell functional on audited face scenes factors through Act, because it depends only on public three-level shell profile counts.
